fields.label: Section Heading
fields.name: pb_heading
fields.instructions: Heading shown above the pull-box cards on the itzenzo.tv homepage.

fields.label: V Pull Box — Stripe Price ID ($1)
fields.name: pb_v_price_id
fields.instructions: Stripe Price ID for the $1 V pull-box entry. Pull boxes are buy-in tickets; no WP product is created.

fields.label: V Pull Box — Description
fields.name: pb_v_description
fields.default_value: Every entry pulls a Pokémon V card. Random shot at a common vintage card on the side.

fields.label: VMAX Pull Box — Stripe Price ID ($2)
fields.name: pb_vmax_price_id
fields.instructions: Stripe Price ID for the $2 VMAX pull-box entry.

fields.label: VMAX Pull Box — Description
fields.name: pb_vmax_description
fields.default_value: Every entry pulls a Pokémon VMAX card. Random shot at a common or uncommon vintage card on the side.
